# MFA for admins

Requires MFA for members of every privileged directory role (Global Admin, Privileged Role Admin, etc.). Ships disabled - review break-glass account excludes before enabling.

Source: [`templates/02-mfa-for-admins.json`](https://github.com/LukeEvansTech/entra-ca-templates/blob/main/templates/02-mfa-for-admins.json).
